transcript.text:
Ta-da!
This brings back memories I used to live right there
There are 3 cheese rice restaurants here
[Popular amongst students: The Cheese Rice]
[Never seen anything like it]
Hello everyone~
I am here in a neighborhood I used to live at
There was a snack bar restaurant in front of my house Maybe 2 minutes away?
There were 3 restaurants that specialized in this
1 closed down recently
The other 1 was the most popular
But they don't like mukbangers filming there
So I'm here at the other location
The students from my school loved this place
It brings back so many memories
[Blue Sky (name of the restaurant)] It really took like a minute to get here

I would always eat rice balls from that convenience store
And in front of that was the other restaurant
Really good times..
[Traces of memories within the last 20 years]
Other places sell the cheese rice too
But this place is the original
Students from other schools would come to eat here
It's really cheap
Spicy Rice Cake used to be like a dollar
[2020.02.07 Menu]
Excuse me,
1 small-sized pizza spicy rice cake
1 large-sized kimchi cheese rice
The original cheese rice is better
Really? Then I'll get the original, please
Large-size? Yes

1 cheese spicy rice cake,
1 cold spicy chewy noodles,
1 fried dumpling, 1 fried pork,
Sweet & sour chicken too, please
You're eating all of this?
You can't
I can't finish it all?
It's been a while since the last time I came here, so I can't recall the portion size
Was that too much?
[24-year old Tzuyang] Don't I still look like a student?
[Chat: You looks like you're still in high school]
[Chat: Middle schooler]
No way
[Staff staring] What?
[The Cheese Rice is here]
This smell!

Really
This is it
This is the original You can't get this anywhere else
Amazing, right?
Thank you Cheese Spicy Rice Cake?
Pizza Rice Cake?
[Cheese Spicy Rice Cake]
[Pizza Spicy Rice Cake] This is my first time trying this too
I was going to wait for everything, but Let's just start
Looks good
Flour rice cake
Chewy
It's very sweet
Really takes me back
They don't skimp out on cheese
[Eat everything that's given to you]

[Squid Tempura]
[Sweet & Sour Chicken]
[Fried Pork with Sweet & Sour Sauce]
Thank you
This sauce brings back memories
Thank you
Fried Dumplings for 1,000 Won (~$0.91 USD)
1,000 Won!
She can't finish it
That's a lot of food
This feels more squishy than this one
It tastes different
The Pizza one is sweet, but the cheese one is even sweeter
I can taste the pizza flavor
It's good I personally like this one better
Fried Pork

The good old days
Yum
This sauce is really..
You guys know that original spicy chicken flavor from a long time ago?
You will know right away
Thank you
Cold Spicy Chewy Noodles 2,000 Won (~$1.82 USD)
[The table is not complete]
Delicious
It's been such a long time
Fried dumplings
Yum
What else are we waiting on?
This is all? It's not enough..
[What did she just say?]
This is everything that she ordered, right? What!?

This is the cold spicy chewy noodles
When I was younger, I had no idea why these were so delicious
The dumpling tastes good
The fried pork is super crispy when it first comes out
[3 rice cake at a time]
[A spoonful]
[And some sweet & sour chicken]
It's not like, "Wow, this place is amazing"
But it just brings back memories
Back to when I was in elementary and middle school
Scrape every last bit of it
[The food is slowly disappearing]
No matter how much I eat it, it takes me back to the good old days
Just to describe what it tastes like,
You know those 30~40 cent chicken skewers from back then?
With the Pikachu sauce (brand)

Everyone love cheese They would go crazy for it
That's probably why they made the Cheese Rice
[Let's speed things up]
They're cleaning up for closing, so I need to go soon
[Closing time soon]
Goodbye cucumber
[Finishing up 1 by 1]
[1 shot 4 kills]
Why is this spicy?
Spicy! What's so spicy?
I've never had anything this spicy from here
I was good at eating spicy food when I was younger
I went to eat at the spiciest ramen place back then
A level higher than the spiciest level
Now I'm not good at eating spicy foods
I'll finish up the noodles first and then the rice

[Last bite of the noodles]
[Last bite of the cheese rice]
Spicy!
I'm still a bit hungry,
but I don't like hardened cheese
I finished everything else
I need to catch the school bus now for an afterschool program
Thanks everyone~
[Tell me I'm dreaming...]
That's amazing
Really
That's no joke
[Subtitles by Hyun Choi antharoni@gmail.com]
